final:
// // This module selects between two 32-bit inputs, RT and EXT_E, based on the ALUsrc_rt control signal. When ALUsrc_rt is 1, the output ALUsrc2 is set to RT; when ALUsrc_rt is 0, the output is assigned the value of EXT_E.
module top_module(
	input [31:0] RT,
	input [31:0] EXT_E,
	input ALUsrc_rt,
	output [31:0] ALUsrc2
);assign ALUsrc2 = (ALUsrc_rt == 0)?RT:EXT_E;endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module selects between two 32-bit inputs, RT and EXT_E, based on the ALUsrc_rt control signal. When ALUsrc_rt is 1, the output ALUsrc2 is set to RT; when ALUsrc_rt is 0, the output is assigned the value of EXT_E.
